name: CPU Architecture and Microarchitecture Optimization
description: CPU 架构调优:缓存、SIMD、内存模型与微架构优化

detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d=>['cpu_arch','microarchitecture','simd'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s=>/\b(cache line|branch predict|simd|avx|sse|neon|memory barrier|false sharing|numa|pipeline stall|cpu microarchitecture|cache miss)\b/i.test(s)) ? 0.9 : 0
